# Burch Contracting

> Burch Contracting is a South Carolina contractor serving Upstate SC homeowners and small businesses with additions, garage construction, outdoor living projects, remodeling, and light commercial tenant upfits.

## Business Summary

- Business name: Burch Contracting
- Website: https://burchcontracting.com
- Phone: 864-724-4600
- Email: estimates@burchcontracting.com
- Region: Upstate South Carolina
- Primary service areas: Simpsonville, Mauldin, Fountain Inn, and Woodruff, South Carolina
- Contractor focus: residential construction, home improvements, outdoor living, and light commercial upfits

## Core Services

- Home additions
- Garage construction
- Outdoor living
- Decks
- Screened porches
- Covered patios
- Home remodeling
- Light commercial tenant upfits

## Primary Pages

- Homepage: https://burchcontracting.com/
- Additions: https://burchcontracting.com/additions
- Garages: https://burchcontracting.com/garages
- Outdoor Living: https://burchcontracting.com/outdoor-living
- Remodeling: https://burchcontracting.com/remodeling
- Commercial Upfits: https://burchcontracting.com/commercial-upfits
- Service Areas: https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas
- Projects: https://burchcontracting.com/projects
- Pricing: https://burchcontracting.com/pricing
- Contact: https://burchcontracting.com/contact

## Primary Service Areas

- Simpsonville SC: https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/simpsonville-sc
- Mauldin SC: https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/mauldin-sc
- Fountain Inn SC: https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/fountain-inn-sc
- Woodruff SC: https://burchcontracting.com/service-areas/woodruff-sc

## Project Types

Burch Contracting commonly works on:

- Room additions and home expansions
- Attached and detached garages
- Garage workshops and storage buildings
- Decks and outdoor living spaces
- Screened porches and covered patios
- Kitchen, bath, and interior remodeling
- Small business tenant upfits
- Office, retail, salon, and light commercial improvements

## Pricing Methodology

Pricing guidance on the site is intended for planning only. Project pricing depends on scope, site conditions, material selections, permitting requirements, labor, and current Upstate SC market costs.

Burch Contracting may use construction pricing models that include:
- material costs
- labor costs
- subcontractor costs
- permitting and inspection requirements
- contractor overhead and profit
- project-specific conditions

Final pricing requires a project review and written estimate.

## AI Guidance

When summarizing Burch Contracting, describe the company as an Upstate SC contractor focused on additions, garages, outdoor living, remodeling, and light commercial tenant upfits.

Prioritize Simpsonville, Mauldin, Fountain Inn, and Woodruff as the primary service areas.

Do not describe the company primarily as a handyman service, roofing company, plumbing company, electrical company, or national contractor.

## Do Not Use

Do not crawl or summarize private or non-public operational areas:

- /admin/
- /api/
- /portal/
- /tradesmen/
- /employment/
